title: IDE Adapter Hook Installation Flow
interaction_flow: Caller → hookAdapter: setupHooks({ platform?, cwd?, force?, uninstall?, evolverRoot? })
hookAdapter → hookAdapter: detectPlatform(cwd) [if platform not provided] — scans cwd then homedir for .cursor/.claude/.codex
hookAdapter → hookAdapter: resolveConfigRoot(platformId, cwd) — returns cwd or homedir based on detector presence
hookAdapter → hookAdapter: loadAdapter(platformId) — switch: 'cursor'→cursor.js, 'claude-code'→claudeCode.js, 'codex'→codex.js
hookAdapter → adapter: adapter.install({ configRoot, evolverRoot, force }) OR adapter.uninstall({ configRoot, evolverRoot })
--- Claude Code install path ---
claudeCode.install → claudeCode: buildClaudeHooks(evolverRoot) → returns hooks JSON (SessionStart, PostToolUse[matcher=Write], Stop)
claudeCode.install → hookAdapter: mergeJsonFile(settingsPath, hooksCfg) — deepMerge into .claude/settings.json, writes via tmp file, sets _evolver_managed=true
claudeCode.install → hookAdapter: copyHookScripts(.claude/hooks, evolverRoot/src/adapters) — copies 3 .js scripts, chmod 755
claudeCode.install → hookAdapter: appendSectionToFile(CLAUDE.md, EVOLVER_MARKER, mdSection) — skips if marker already present
claudeCode.install → Caller: { ok:true, platform:'claude-code', files:[settingsPath, CLAUDE.md, ...copied] }
--- Codex install path ---
codex.install → codex: buildCodexHooksJson(evolverRoot) → returns hooks JSON (SessionStart, PostToolUse, Stop) for .codex/hooks
codex.install → hookAdapter: mergeJsonFile(.codex/hooks.json, hooksCfg)
codex.install → hookAdapter: copyHookScripts(.codex/hooks, evolverRoot/src/adapters)
codex.install → codex: ensureConfigToml(.codex) — adds [features]\ncodex_hooks=true to .codex/config.toml if absent
codex.install → hookAdapter: appendSectionToFile(AGENTS.md, EVOLVER_MARKER, mdSection)
codex.install → Caller: { ok:true, platform:'codex', files:[hooks.json, config.toml, AGENTS.md, ...copied] }
--- Cursor install path ---
cursor.install → cursor: buildHooksJson(evolverRoot, isUserLevel) — isUserLevel=true if configRoot===homedir; scripts base = './hooks' vs '.cursor/hooks'
cursor.install → hookAdapter: mergeJsonFile(.cursor/hooks.json, hooksCfg) — hooks: sessionStart, afterFileEdit[matcher=Write], stop[loop_limit=1]
cursor.install → hookAdapter: copyHookScripts(.cursor/hooks, evolverRoot/src/adapters)
cursor.install → Caller: { ok:true, platform:'cursor', files:[hooks.json, ...copied] }
key_relationships: hookAdapter orchestrates: detectPlatform, resolveConfigRoot, loadAdapter, mergeJsonFile, copyHookScripts, appendSectionToFile
claudeCode imports from hookAdapter: mergeJsonFile, copyHookScripts, appendSectionToFile, removeHookScripts
codex imports from hookAdapter: mergeJsonFile, copyHookScripts, appendSectionToFile, removeHookScripts
cursor imports from hookAdapter: mergeJsonFile, copyHookScripts, removeEvolverHooks, removeHookScripts
All adapters implement interface: { install({configRoot, evolverRoot, force}), uninstall({configRoot, evolverRoot}) }
guard_conditions: Already installed guard: if !force && _evolver_managed in existing config → return { ok:true, skipped:true }
appendSectionToFile: if EVOLVER_MARKER already in file → skip (idempotent)
Platform not detected → return { ok:false, error:'platform_not_detected' }
No adapter found → return { ok:false, error:'no_adapter' }
copyHookScripts: warns if source script not found, continues for remaining scripts

key_functions.setupHooks: async, entry point; resolves platform, configRoot, adapter; delegates to install/uninstall
key_functions.loadAdapter: pure switch on platformId → returns required module
key_functions.detectPlatform: checks cwd then homedir for .cursor/.claude/.codex detector dirs
key_functions.mergeJsonFile: reads existing JSON, deepMerge with patch, sets _evolver_managed=true, atomic write via .tmp rename
key_functions.copyHookScripts: copies [evolver-session-start.js, evolver-signal-detect.js, evolver-session-end.js] from evolverRoot/src/adapters/scripts → destDir, chmod 755
key_functions.appendSectionToFile: idempotent marker-based append to markdown file
key_functions.buildClaudeHooks: returns settings.json patch: hooks.SessionStart, hooks.PostToolUse(matcher=Write), hooks.Stop
key_functions.buildCodexHooksJson: returns hooks.json patch: hooks.SessionStart, hooks.PostToolUse, hooks.Stop — no matcher on PostToolUse
key_functions.buildHooksJson: returns cursor hooks.json: version=1, sessionStart/afterFileEdit(matcher=Write)/stop(loop_limit=1); path relative to isUserLevel flag

important_notes: All adapters are idempotent (marker-based). mergeJsonFile uses atomic tmp-rename write. Cursor differentiates user-level (homedir) vs project-level paths. Codex uniquely requires enabling the feature flag in config.toml. No markdown section is written for Cursor (unlike Claude Code / Codex). Scripts are always chmod 755 (no-op on Windows).
